ecb.description: FAIL TO MAINTAIN BLDG IN CODE COMPLIANT MANNER NOTED@EXPOSURE #1 FIRSTFLR COMMERCIAL SPACE WRK BEING DONE UNDER APPL#1200200166 WHILE DEMOLATON OF 1ST FLR & RENEWAL OF SHEETROCK CEILING IS SAGGING APPROX 1 TO 2

WORK DOES NOT CONFORM TO APPROVED PLANS #104913738 ALT TYPE II NON CONFORMING WORK NOTED: FILLED RENOVATION OF 4 APARTMENTS ON EACH FLOOR AT FRONT BUILDING. DOB RECORDS INDICATED ONLY 2 APARTMENTS ON EACH FLOOR
WORK WITHOUT PERMIT. WORK NOTED: INSTALL WATER AND WASTE LINE TO CREATE 2 ADDITIONAL BATHROOMS AND KITCHENS. REMEDY: OBTAIN PERMIT OR RESTORE TO PRIOR LEGAL CONDITIONS.

RESIDENCE ALTERED FOR OCCUPANCY AS A DWELLING FOR MORE THAN THE LEGALLY APPROVED NUMBER OF FAMILIES. AT TIME OF INSPECTION WORK ONGOING AT APTS 1 AND 2 AT 2ND FLR AND 7 AND 8 AT 3RD FLR. C OF O #096652 STATES

FAILURE TO MAINTAIN BUILDING IN CODE-COMPLIANT MANNER. FAILURE TO PROVIDE NUMBER OF REQUIRED MEANS OF EGRESS FOR EVERY FLOOR PER BC 1018.1 AND 27-366 FOR TRANSIENT USE. RMDY: DISCONTINUE ILLEGAL OCCUPANCY.
FAILURE TO PROVIDE FIRE ALARM SYSTEM FOR TRANSIENT USE. RMDY: DISCON TINUE ILLEGAL OCCUPANCY.

FAILURE TO MAINTAIN BLDG WALLS AND APPURTENANCES. NOTE: STUCCO CLAPPING IS CRACKED, BULGING AND MISSING CREATING HOLES WHICH EXPOSE UNDERLY ING BRICK EXTERIOR WALL WHICH IS MISSING MORTAR JOINTS AT REAR SOUTH
FAILURE TO MAINTAIN BUILDING IN CODE-COMPLIANT MANNER. LACK OF A SYSTEM OF AUTOMATIC SPRINKLERS WHERE IS REQUIRED AS PER BC 902.1 AND 27-954FOR TRANSIENT USE. RMDY: DISCONTINUE ILLEGAL OCCUPANCY.

PERMANENT DWELLING USED/CONVERTED FOR OTHER THAN PERMANENT RESIDENTIALPURPOSES. DOB RECORDS/COFO #96652 INDICATES BUILDING TO BE LEGALLY APPROVED AS A CLASS "A" M/D NOW APT #5 USED CONVERTED TO TRANSIENT USE
